reviews.comment:
Se quedo en el tiempo!!!! Lugar pequeño para tanta demanda!!!!! Una infraestructura digna de los años 80's
40 minutos para cargar nafta en un día poco requerido por el turista

(Translated by Google)
It's stuck in the past! A small place for such high demand! Infrastructure straight out of the 80s!
40 minutes to fill up with gas on a day when tourists aren't very busy.
